attributes.action: Make basic & neutral politics is mandatory to be taught in secondary schools.
attributes.additional_details: I have seen people have no idea how politics work. I have made this because people should know what can happen with a Government and so they are able to make a good choice of what they think is right. This will also allow people to participate more in democracy.
attributes.background: This is because when people are brought up, they should be taught about basic and neutral politics so they understand what they are able to do and what to do during elections or other situations.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Make British politics compulsory in the secondary school curriculum
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757061
